name: Masquerade: Hell Academy
short_description: A Boys Love visual novel set around a pulse-pounding hostage situation. Can Numata make it out of things unscathed? Every choice matters! Fully translated into English with the original Japanese voice acting intact.
detailed_description:
Story

The quiet Numata Hiroshi is being blackmailed by his classmate, Himehara Yoritake. One day, Himehara orders Numata to steal the exam answers off the teacher's desk, which sets off a chain of events culminating in the two men being among the captives taken by a criminal impersonating a police officer.

Their captor is a deranged, cruel man, and if they’re going to survive, they have no choice but to comply with his demands…

Characters

The cast of Masquerade is a diverse group. As well as Himehara and Numata there is Hachiouji, an honor student; Mr Shimeno, a teacher; Oizumi, a local TV reporter who becomes embroiled in the hostage situation, and Takaura, a police officer. Then, of course, there's the captor.

Gameplay and Features

Masquerade is a visual novel, where your choices determine how the narrative branches and scenes play out until the next choice is required. The game has its original full Japanese voice acting intact, and all text has been translated into English.
